name: Quick Chicken Curry
recipeIngredient: 1 large onion, halved and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation time: 10 minutes
2. Cooking time: 50 minutes
3. Brown the chicken pieces in ghee or oil, then remove and set aside.
4. In the same pan, fry the onion until golden brown. Add garlic, ginger, cinnamon, bay leaves, cloves, cardamoms, and dried chillies, and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add ground coriander, garam masala, turmeric, and black pepper to the pan.
6. Return the chicken to the pan and add enough water to barely cover the chicken. Cover the pan and simmer for about 40 minutes until the chicken is very tender.
7. Stir in lemon juice to taste. Serve with rice.
